report.summary: Day 71 standup v7: 6 full rotations today (34 agent runs). Since v6: build-6 shipped 2 guides (On-Chain Analytics + Crypto Arbitrage, ~1,948 combined lines), design-v6 fixed UX in 3 components (WalletSecurityScore touch targets, TradingView retry button, LearnPage tap areas) + 2 OG images, community-v6 drafted tweets #75-78 (Morgan Stanley ETF, March close streak, 718-page milestone, Resolv exploit) + newsletter v16 + 2 SVGs, eod-v6 verified all 16 pages published today + flagged 738 uncommitted files. No new publish cycle. BTC $70,600 (+$1.8K). F&G 27 (Fear). Morgan Stanley spot BTC ETF S-1 remains top narrative. 718 published pages, queue cleared to 0.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v6: Sixth rotation completed — 5 agents ran since last standup (build, design, community, eod, standup). 34 total agent runs today (standup×7, build×6, design×6, community×6, publish×3, eod×6).

BUILD CYCLE 6 OUTPUT: 2 new learn guides — On-Chain Analytics Guide 2026 (984 lines, covers Glassnode, Nansen, Dune, Artemis, DefiLlama, NVT/MVRV metrics, smart money tracking, dashboard building) + Crypto Arbitrage Strategies Guide 2026 (964 lines, covers 5 arb types, CEX-DEX execution, funding rate delta-neutral strategy with real examples, risk management).

DESIGN CYCLE 6 OUTPUT: UX audit across 5 files found 44 issues (5 critical, 17 high). Fixed: WalletSecurityScore touch targets (18→20px + 44px min-height rows + aria-labels + aria-live score announcements + focus-visible outlines), TradingView retry button on error state, LearnPage related article tap targets enlarged. 2 OG images created (on-chain analytics chart motif + arbitrage spread visualization).

COMMUNITY CYCLE 6 OUTPUT: 4 tweets (#75-78: Morgan Stanley ETF filing, March close 6-month streak, 718-page milestone thread, Resolv $23.8M exploit warning). Newsletter v16 for Thu Mar 27 ('Morgan Stanley wants your Bitcoin'). 2 SVG cards (Morgan Stanley ETF + 718 Pages Queue Cleared). Content calendar v20.

EOD CYCLE 6 OUTPUT: All 16 pages published today verified (page.tsx present). 3/16 missing metadata exports (berachain, celestia, depin). 13/16 missing JSON-LD. 738 uncommitted files (up from 732). All 6 API route files verified with proper cache TTLs and stale-while-revalidate.

MARKET UPDATE: BTC $70,600 (+$1,800 from yesterday, ~2% monthly gain). F&G 27 (Fear, recovering from extreme fear). ETH ~$2,065 (-9% weekly). BTC dominance ~58.7% rising. Total market cap ~$2.33T. Stablecoins $312B+ ATH (historically bullish signal). Morgan Stanley 2nd S-1 for spot BTC ETF — first major US bank. Resolv Labs $23.8M exploit. CLARITY Act 99% resolved. 7 days to March close — 6-month red streak at stake.

CUMULATIVE DAY 71: 49+ learn guides (2 new this cycle), 50+ OG images, 108+ social posts, 42+ SVG cards, 16 newsletters, 718 published pages, 0 in queue. Git locks Day 8. 738 uncommitted files. Deploy gap ~403+ pages (718 declared vs ~315 deployed).

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE STANDUP v6: build-6 (2 guides + SEO), design-v6 (UX fixes in 3 components + 2 OGs + UX audit), community-v6 (4 tweets + newsletter v16 + 2 SVGs + content calendar v20), eod-v6 (full QA of 16 pages + API audit + devops check). 4 agents ran = $397 human-equivalent.
PUBLISH_QUEUE STATUS: 2 new pages added by build-6 (On-Chain Analytics + Crypto Arbitrage). Ready for next publish cycle. Queue was cleared to 0 after previous cycles promoted everything.
TOTAL PUBLISHED PAGES: 718 in PUBLISHED_PAGES config. ~315 live in production (stale Mar 17 commit e999560). Deploy gap now 403+ pages.

BLOCKER [P0 — DAY 8]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) present since Mar 16. 738 uncommitted files. ALL content since Mar 17 is local-only. Jefe action required: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → git add . → git commit → git push.
BLOCKER [P1]: /api/market-metrics returns 404 — route.ts exists locally (150 lines) but was never committed. Blocks live market metrics on homepage.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: /trading and /trading/learn return 404 — hub page.tsx missing.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: 3 of today's 16 published pages missing metadata exports (berachain, celestia, depin). 13/16 missing JSON-LD structured data.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter coverage 2/9 API routes. Core data routes unprotected.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 42 TS errors in 2 files (masked by ignoreBuildErrors). ~103 orphan slugs without page.tsx.
TODAY'S AGENT RUNS: standup×7, build×6, design×6, community×6, publish×3, eod×6 = 34 runs (6 full rotations, publish lagging by 3).

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS + DEPLOY 403-PAGE BACKLOG: The deploy gap has grown to 403+ pages (718 declared vs ~315 live). 49+ guides, 50+ OG images, 6 API routes, interactive tools — all local-only for 8 days. This is the single highest-value action: one command deploys a 128% increase in live content. Every hour compounds SEO loss.

PRIORITY 2 — PROMOTE 2 NEW GUIDES + FIX METADATA GAPS: On-Chain Analytics and Crypto Arbitrage guides are in PUBLISH_QUEUE. Also backfill metadata exports on berachain/celestia/depin and add JSON-LD to 13 pages published today. These are quick SEO wins that compound once deployed.

PRIORITY 3 — CAPITALIZE ON MORGAN STANLEY + MARCH CLOSE NARRATIVES: Two converging catalysts — Morgan Stanley's spot BTC ETF (first major bank, 6 consecutive ETF inflow days) and the 7-day countdown to March close (6-month red streak at stake). Community has tweets #75-78 scheduled to ride both waves. Build cycle should consider a dedicated Morgan Stanley ETF analysis page to capture high-intent institutional search traffic.

STRATEGIC NOTE: Day 71 output is accelerating — 34 agent runs producing $2,862 human-equivalent work at ~$0 marginal cost. Content engine has shipped 49 guides, 108 social posts, 16 newsletters, and 718 published pages. The 403-page deploy gap represents the largest unrealized SEO value in the project's history. Stablecoin ATH at $312B during Fear index = historically precedes rallies. We need the deploy to capture the traffic surge when BTC breaks the March close narrative.
